result.text: Scan anomaly: a vehicle with fully mirrored windows. Our own scan is reflecting back at us. We are, in effect, scanning ourselves. Push through the reflection, or accept the mirror?

moveon.text: The vessel drifts out of optimal range. Its secrets remain its own. For now.

push.text: Adjusting frequencies... we're through! Interior reading shows {pick:a mobile aquarium|forty houseplants|a very small recording studio}. Also, they know we're scanning. They've written 'HI' in the condensation. Respond?

hi.text: 'HI' transmitted via headlight flicker. They responded with a windshield-wiper wave. First contact protocols: complete. Humanity: confirmed on both sides.

dark.text: Going dark. But they saw us, Captain. Somewhere out there is a vehicle that knows. The mirror remembers.

accept.text: The mirror accepted. Our scan returns only ourselves: one improbable ship, doing its best. Sensors report this is called 'self-reflection' and log it as healthy.
